ventures.name: VIVA AI
ventures.tagline: Next-generation AI Receptionist & Office Manager for dental and medical offices.
ventures.description: Leading AI strategy and product for a vertical AI platform automating front-desk operations, scheduling, and patient communications across hundreds of practices.

ventures.name: Themis AI
ventures.tagline: Empowering the world to create, advance, and deploy trustworthy AI.
ventures.description: MIT spin-out building uncertainty-aware tooling for production deep learning systems — used by enterprises to quantify and mitigate risk in their models.

research.title: Uncertainty-aware Language Modeling for Selective QA
research.summary: Calibrated uncertainty estimates that let large language models abstain on questions they shouldn't answer.

research.title: Risk-Aware Image Generation by Estimating and Propagating Uncertainty
research.summary: A generative pipeline that propagates uncertainty through diffusion models to flag low-confidence outputs.

research.title: Capsa: A Unified Framework for Quantifying Risk in Deep Neural Networks
research.summary: Open-source framework wrapping arbitrary PyTorch/TF models with bias, label-noise, and epistemic uncertainty estimators.

research.title: Systems and Methods for Deep Learning Model Optimization
research.summary: Patented techniques for compressing and accelerating deep learning models without sacrificing reliability.
